name: Cannelini Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine all ingredients except the lettuce.
2. Toss well until everything is evenly distributed.
3. Chill for at least an hour, preferably overnight.
4. To serve, place a scoop of bean salad in each lettuce leaf.
PER SERVING: 91 Cal.; 5g Prot.; 0.1g Fat; 18g Carb.; 0 Chol.; 185mg Sod.; 3mg Fiber.
